entities.name: Walt Disney World Resort
entities.notes: Resort-wide umbrella entity — catches headlines that say 'Disney World' generically without naming a specific park.

entities.name: Disneyland Resort
entities.notes: Resort-wide umbrella entity — catches generic 'Disneyland' mentions not tied to a specific park.

entities.name: Disneyland Paris
entities.notes: Resort-wide umbrella entity, distinct from the specific 'Disneyland Park Paris' attraction park.

entities.name: Tokyo Disney Resort
entities.notes: Resort-wide umbrella entity for Tokyo Disneyland + Tokyo DisneySea.

entities.name: Hong Kong Disneyland Resort
entities.notes: Resort-wide umbrella entity, distinct from the specific Hong Kong Disneyland Park.

entities.name: Shanghai Disney Resort
entities.notes: Resort-wide umbrella entity, distinct from the specific Shanghai Disneyland park.

entities.name: Disney's Lakeshore Lodge
entities.notes: Added after being spotted as a real, currently-covered WDW resort missing from the knowledge base — verify details against official source pages.

entities.name: D23 Expo
entities.notes: Disney's biennial fan convention — high-volume announcement source, added for event coverage.

entities.name: Star Wars
entities.notes: Franchise/media entity — general Disney entertainment news now in scope, not just parks/resorts.

entities.name: Marvel
entities.notes: Bare 'Marvel' kept out of keywords (too generic/collision-prone); qualified phrases used instead.

entities.name: Pixar
entities.notes: Studio brand name, unique enough to safely match bare.

entities.name: Toy Story
entities.notes: Covers franchise/film news (e.g. Toy Story 5) separately from the in-park attractions.

entities.name: Frozen
entities.notes: Covers franchise/film news separately from the in-park attractions.

entities.name: Moana
entities.notes: Covers franchise/film news (e.g. Moana 3) separately from the in-park attractions.

entities.name: Zootopia
entities.notes: Coined word, safe to match bare; covers franchise/film news separately from the in-park attractions.

entities.name: Encanto
entities.notes: Franchise/media entity.

entities.name: Inside Out
entities.notes: Franchise/media entity.

entities.name: The Lion King
entities.notes: Franchise/media entity.

entities.name: Winnie the Pooh
entities.notes: Franchise/media entity, distinct from the in-park attraction entity.

entities.name: Coco
entities.notes: Bare 'Coco' excluded from keywords (too generic/collision-prone); qualified phrases used instead.

entities.name: Disney Princess
entities.notes: Franchise entity; bare 'princess' excluded from keywords as too generic.

entities.name: The Walt Disney Company
entities.notes: General corporate news (earnings, executive moves, etc.), now in scope per product decision to include general Disney news.

entities.name: Disney+
entities.notes: 'Disney+' deliberately excluded from keywords — text normalization strips the '+' symbol, degrading it to bare 'disney' and matching almost anything. Only the spelled-out 'Disney Plus' is used for matching.

entities.name: Bob Iger
entities.notes: Disney CEO — unique full name, safe to match bare.
